name: Italian Pasta Fajoile
recipeInstructions:
1. Break spaghetti into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
2. In a deep skillet, sauté onions in olive oil until translucent and brown.
3. Add tomatoes, tomato paste, and pepper to the pan.
4. Reduce heat to simmer and cook slowly for 20 minutes.
5. Bring 3 quarts of water to a full boil.
6. Add 2 tablespoons of salt and cook pasta al dente.
7. Add beans to the cooking sauce and cook for a few more minutes.
8. Begin draining the spaghetti, but reserve some liquid.
9. Return the reserved liquid to the pot until the pasta and spaghetti are at equal levels.
10. Add the sauce while stirring. Adjust the amount of liquid to achieve the desired consistency. Be careful not to add too much, as this may dilute the flavor.
11. Add black pepper to taste.
